exploreUrl:
<js>
www=baseUrl+"/biaoqian/";
css=".authorsbox>ul>li>a";
u1="/s.php,{"method": "POST","body": "objectType=2&type=articlename&s=\";"}
u2=",{"charset": "gbk\";"}
importClass(org.jsoup.Jsoup);
function wy(x,y)<
list=Jsoup.parse(java.ajax(x)).select(y).toArray().map(a=>a.text()+"::"+u1+a.text()+u2).join("
");return list>;
result=wy(www,css)
</js>
